items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Lebanon Peace Talks Resume as Israel Keeps Up Strikes
items.summary: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel vowed to continue Israel’s campaign against Hezbollah, even as Lebanese and Israeli officials met in Washington.

items.title: US military says it fired missile at Iran-bound oil tanker
items.summary: US Central Command says the vessel's engine room was hit after the crew "ignored repeated warnings".
